MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Mary Elizabeth Inn is present. Represented by Diane Love.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mary Howard is present.
Attorney Molly K. Lateiner representing the defendant through full scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of Oct-01-2012 is vacated. (501/JPT)
